tasks.title: Update strategy-improve threshold handling to skip offending dates
tasks.description: Change strategy-improve-report so a sampled date that exceeds missing-history-threshold logs a warning and is skipped, instead of aborting the entire workflow.
acceptance_criteria: strategy-improve-report no longer exits the whole run when one sampled date exceeds missing-history-threshold.
The command emits a warning, records skipped-date metadata, and continues processing remaining sampled dates.
Automated tests cover the new skip-with-warning path.

instruction:
## Task: Strategy improve threshold skip behavior (T21)

**Description:** Update the strategy-improve-report workflow so dates exceeding `--missing-history-threshold` are warned and skipped rather than aborting the full run.

**Priority:** HIGH

**Acceptance Criteria:**
1. strategy-improve-report logs a warning and skips the sampled date when missing-history ratio exceeds threshold.
2. The workflow continues with later sampled dates and records skipped-date details in output metadata.
3. Existing daily-selection behavior remains unchanged.
4. Tests cover the new skip path.

**Your Task:**
Please update the specification so the Coder can implement this behavior safely without broadening scope.

Return valid JSON only.
summary: T21 is a scoped behavior change limited to strategy-improve-report threshold handling.
